violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back by the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2026
The grout between the tile floor has area of poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2026

American Chop Suey, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Food product was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back by the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2026

The walk-in freezer located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Walk in freezer was holding an ambient temperature of 28 DF. Establishment must make repair to walk in freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025
The grout between the tile floor has area of poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2026

The ceiling by the two door Delfield is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The coving by the entrance to the dish room is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets on the two door Delfield, and the Walk in were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

The floors in the kitchen area have areas of low grout (Dishwasher Area, stove area). The coving by the entrance of the kitchen has an area of broken coving. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2024
